properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2 v6 v2 v7 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Beyond this flesh That you can see now Beyond the weaknesses Of this flesh There is a connection invisible With Jesus Christ

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I don't know how, I don't know why I cannot explain the love Of God for my soul But down inside of me, When I hear the Word My heart says amen… I say, Amen!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Beyond this flesh That you can see now Beyond the weaknesses Of this flesh There is a connection invisible On the other side

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Now, He has said I will be perfect With the virtues Of Jesus Christ Himself But I look around I see so much imperfections Shown to me by The devil my enemy Trying to keep me sad and depressed But I stand right up on my two feet I look at Him straight in the eye… And I say…

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Now, He has said I will be raptured And fly away in the sky And discover this seventh dimension But I can feel the force of gravity Trying to keep me down in to this earth And get me stuck in this realm But I stand right up on my two feet Lift my hands challenging gravity And I say…

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Beyond this flesh That you can see now Beyond the weaknesses Of this flesh There is a connection invisible With the other side

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: To my glorious body, I say Amen Amen to my theophany, I say Amen One day I will be gone, I say Amen I say Amen!
